name: Galveston Transportation LLC
owner_or_parent: independent (Galveston Limousine & Transportation / Texas Bus Line)
recent_news: Family-owned limo/charter operator founded 1960 as Texas Bus Line; markets itself as oldest limo/transportation company in Texas. No school-bus contract route business identified.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in fit for Summit: limo/charter/event company, not a school-district contract operator. School activity limited to ad-hoc field trips/party-bus rentals.

name: Midwest Bus Co
recent_news: Very small directory-only footprint in Watertown, MN. No website content accessible (403); no public news of M&A or district contracts. Distinct from Midwest Transit Equipment (dealer) and Midwest Bus Parts.
fit_notes: Too little public info to evaluate. If confirmed to be an independent micro school-bus operator in the western Twin Cities exurbs, could be a small bolt-on; otherwise likely sub-scale for Summit.

name: Reliable School-Med Transport
recent_news: Despite the 'School' in the name, the company is a non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) provider serving New England; no evidence of K-12 school district contracts.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in: NEMT/medical-only operator, not a school-bus contractor. Out of scope.

name: Big Red Bus
recent_news: Yelp lists Big Red Bus as CLOSED (as of May 2026 update). Tour/event operator using vintage English double-deckers; sold from founders Mike & Pete to James DuLac in June 2014. Never a school-district contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit: defunct tour/event novelty bus operator, not a school-bus business. Disregard for Summit tuck-in pipeline.

name: Transaction Corporate Shuttles
recent_news: Woman-owned, MA SDO-certified WBE; TransAction Associates (parent consulting arm) founded 1990, Corporate Shuttles subsidiary launched 1995. ~119 operators/mechanics/staff serving 925k+ annual passengers. No K-12 school district contract business identified.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in: corporate/commuter shuttle operator (employer shuttles, events), not a yellow-bus school-district contractor. Out of scope.
